comments.body: ✅ A new PR has been created in buildah to vendor these changes: **https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6385**
@Luap99 I think we need to downgrade go version in github actions, see https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6385

> @Luap99 I think we need to downgrade go version in github actions, see [containers/buildah#6385](https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6385)

This repo needs 1.24.2 per https://github.com/containers/container-libs/commit/7764227128600ec6f8a052dbc59fb9450d382905 so that just gets synced as well, it has nothing to od with the version used in the github action. We need to update the buildah task instead.
